description_long: This object is a weathered, upright gravestone set on a rectangular stone base, surrounded by a patch of grass. The front face features an ornate, arched top and a decorative border framing an inscription, though the text is partially eroded and difficult to read. The stone has a mottled gray and white coloration, with visible signs of aging such as discoloration and surface wear. The back of the gravestone is plain and unadorned, showing only the natural texture of the stone. The base is slightly raised above the surrounding ground, with the grass appearing uneven and patchy. The overall appearance suggests it is an old, traditional headstone commonly found in historic graveyards or cemeteries.
description: A weathered upright gravestone with an ornate front inscription, set on a stone base and surrounded by patchy grass. The stone is grayish-white and shows signs of age and erosion.
description_view_0: The front view shows the ornate, arched top of the gravestone with a decorative border and partially legible inscription.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the gravestone and the rectangular stone base, with visible grass around the base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, unadorned back of the gravestone, highlighting its weathered stone texture.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the thinness of the gravestone and the stone base, with more of the grassy patch visible.
